_publications._publicationTitle: C6 Cell Injection into the Optic Nerve of Long-Evans Rats: A Short-Term Model of Optic Pathway Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: Vimentin was found to be expressed in almost all C6 cells analyzed (98%), which is consistent with other studies stating the high expression of Vimentin in C6 cell population
details: Vimentin expressed in 98% of C6 cells analyzed, consistent with high expression in this cell line
